title: Excited States VQE: Beyond Ground State Calculations
description: Master techniques for computing excited electronic states using variational quantum algorithms, including VQD, SSVQE, and multistate approaches.
learningObjectives: Understand the importance of excited states in quantum chemistry
Implement Variational Quantum Deflation (VQD) for sequential excited states
Apply Subspace-Search VQE (SSVQE) for simultaneous state optimization
Use overlap penalty methods to enforce orthogonality
Calculate excited state properties and transition amplitudes
Handle symmetry constraints in excited state calculations
